Notes: Prerequisite uses an unrelated existing name so the UPDATE is accepted into the processing path, then attempts to delete an RR that is already absent. Follow-up query checks that the TXT rrset remains absent if the server treats the update as a no-op.

Steps.Description: Accept the update via an existing-name prerequisite, then delete an already-absent TXT RR at replay.campus.edu.

Steps.Name: replay.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the TXT rrset is still absent after the delete_rr of already-missing data.
